A safe haven for kids with cancer

Every kid deserves to ROAR.

Cancer picked the wrong families. We surround South Carolina kids and their people with joy, help and a community that never lets go.

Since 2006
walking beside families from diagnosis, through treatment and beyond
Our mission

Courage of a lion. Heart of a family.

We provide year-round, unforgettable experiences for children with cancer and their families in South Carolina: respite, mutual support and joyful activities, always free of charge.

The child has the disease, but the whole family has the cancer. Long treatments, financial havoc, endless worry. Courageous Kidz picks up the pieces, restores normalcy and gives the Magic of Hope.

Our lion was drawn by a kid in the fight. “I'm courageous, like a lion!”

Our founder

They call her “Flash.”

In 1982, Debby Stephenson originated Camp Happy Days as a Realtors' service project. Under her leadership it grew from 29 children and a $5,000 budget to serving more than 200 children and their families a year.

She stepped away in 2005 to care for her husband, Charlie, through his own battle with cancer. But the phone kept ringing: families needed her particular kind of help. In 2006 she founded Courageous Kidz to give it, personal, immediate and always free.

Joy is the program.

Six ways we make life brighter, all year round, all free for families.

Fun-Tastic Family Reunion

Games, boat rides, burgers and music. A whole day away from the disease.

bring sunscreen!

A Mile of Smiles

Surprise celebrations: shopping sprees, dinners out, movie nights mid-treatment.

their pick, always

Pinz-N-Pizza

Bowling, pizza mountains and dessert with old friends and new ones.

strikes optional

Cowabonga Beach Day

Surf lessons with Shaka Surf School on Folly Beach. 37 kidz caught waves last summer.

cowabunga!!

Moms Weekend Retreat

Time for moms to breathe, laugh and be understood, then fight one more round.

happy mom, happy family

Helping Hands & Healing Hearts

Gas cards, groceries, utilities, and gentle support for families who lose their child.

quiet help, every week
97.7%of every dollar goes straight to the kidz

We are small on purpose. No fancy offices, no big salaries. Your gift becomes gas cards, Christmas mornings, beach days and breathing room for families in the fight.

Help us roar a little louder.

Tomorrow is never promised. Every gift helps a courageous kid live wonderfully ordinary days under extraordinary circumstances.
